# cloudflare_zero_trust_dlp_sensitivity_group (Data Source)

Accepted Permissions

- `Zero Trust Read`
- `Zero Trust Write`

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflare_zero_trust_dlp_sensitivity_group" "example_zero_trust_dlp_sensitivity_group" {
  account_id = "account_id"
  sensitivity_group_id = "182bd5e5-6e1a-4fe4-a799-aa6d9a6ab26e"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String)
- `sensitivity_group_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `levels` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--levels))
- `name` (String)
- `template_id` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
